sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28744" key="dusaugh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσ-αυγής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n28744.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">blinding</tr_>, Poet.<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">de herb.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0551.tlg017.perseus-grc1:65" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">65</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
